text.title: Code Decomposition Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from 'file too big' to a green refactor PR.

step.name: detect-bloat
step.input: Source file path + LOC + token count
step.action: Verify LOC > 300 OR tokens > 10k AND ≥2 responsibilities present.

step.name: pick-pattern
step.action: Walk the decision tree to one of the five patterns.
step.decision-gate: If no pattern matches with confidence, escalate — file may need a different methodology (interface extraction, full rewrite).

step.name: draft-move-list
step.action: Emit the move-list JSON: per-symbol src lines, dst path, rationale.

step.name: execute-moves
step.action: Per move: `git mv` (or create dst + delete src), update callers, run tests, commit. Re-export from original location.
step.output: One commit per move; green CI.

step.name: follow-up-api-break
step.action: Open a separate PR that removes the re-exports and migrates consumers.
step.decision-gate: Only after consumers have at least one release cycle to migrate.
